title: Add real Google Calendar and Gmail API drivers with OAuth
goal: Google Calendar과 Gmail에 실제 API 호출을 수행하는 드라이버를 추가한다. OAuth 2.0 토큰 교환/갱신 로직을 구현하고 secret_store에 안전하게 저장한다.

test_requirements.case: OAuth token exchange with mock server

test_requirements.expected: token saved via secret_store, not config_store

test_requirements.case: Calendar create_event falls back to link when no token

constraints: Use google-auth and google-api-python-client if installed, otherwise return helpful error
OAuth tokens must be stored in secret_store, never in config_store or plain files
Google Calendar driver must preserve existing link-generation as fallback
Do not hardcode client_id or client_secret - read from config
All API calls must be async-compatible (use run_in_executor for sync google libs)
Do not modify plugins - plugins call connection_manager which calls drivers
Existing calendar_helper tests must still pass
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
test_focus_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest tests.test_google_oauth tests.test_gmail_driver -v
